items.name: mosaic-accordion
items.title: MosaicAccordion
items.description: MosaicAccordion — @base-ui/react Accordion primitive

items.name: mosaic-activity-feed
items.title: MosaicActivityFeed
items.description: Activity feed card with stagger-reveal rows. Status badges (active/completed/archived), participant avatar stack, message count, timestamp. Props: activities[] {id, type, title, description, timestamp, status, participants?, messages?}, iconMap, viewAllHref, renderLink.

items.name: mosaic-adaptive-grid
items.title: MosaicAdaptiveGrid
items.description: Device-aware CSS grid wrapper. Reads isMobile/isTablet/isDesktop from MosaicDeviceProvider and applies the correct column count. Props: mobileColumns, tabletColumns, desktopColumns, gap. Uses inline CSS for dynamic columns (no JIT issues).

items.name: mosaic-adaptive-modal
items.title: MosaicAdaptiveModal
items.description: Unified modal/sheet: Dialog on desktop, bottom-sheet on mobile. Uses native <dialog> element (focus trap, Escape key, backdrop). Single API: isOpen, onClose, title, children, description. No Radix/Vaul dep — fully portable.

items.name: mosaic-adaptive-navigation
items.title: MosaicAdaptiveNavigation
items.description: Step navigation: tab strip on desktop, expandable accordion on mobile. Props: items[] {id, title, duration?, isComplete?, children?}, activeItem, onItemChange, expandedItems, onToggleExpanded. Zero debate coupling; generic items API.

items.name: mosaic-add-memory-form
items.title: MosaicAddMemoryForm
items.description: MosaicAddMemoryForm — presentational "record a new memory" form

items.name: mosaic-agent-builder-modal
items.title: MosaicAgentBuilderModal
items.description: MosaicAgentBuilderModal — modal shell for composing/configuring an agent, confirmed or cancelled by the host.

items.name: mosaic-agent-card
items.title: MosaicAgentCard
items.description: Generic agent/resource card with status toggle, accent dot, 3-dot dropdown menu. All actions are callbacks.

items.name: mosaic-agent-chat
items.title: MosaicAgentChat
items.description: MosaicAgentChat — presentational session harness: MVP-8, the last MVP piece, wiring MosaicChatThread + MosaicChatMessage + MosaicChatComposer + MosaicApprovalPrompt into one send/resume/respond harness.

items.name: mosaic-agent-composer
items.title: MosaicAgentComposer
items.description: Responsive-pair agent composer: auto-selects Desktop (2-column with live preview) or Mobile (single-column + sticky CTA) via useDevice. Shared props contract: agentName, customInstructions, 4 module slots (role/persona/framework/model), labels override. Generic MosaicComposerModule type — no domain coupling.

items.name: mosaic-agent-editor
items.title: MosaicAgentEditor
items.description: MosaicAgentEditor — agent config form (name / role / instructions)

items.name: mosaic-agent-list
items.title: MosaicAgentList
items.description: Responsive agent list (responsive-pair). Desktop: filter sidebar + grid. Mobile: stacked + filter sheet.

items.name: mosaic-agent-preview
items.title: MosaicAgentPreview
items.description: MosaicAgentPreview — presentational, controlled preview of an agent configuration before creation is confirmed.

items.name: mosaic-alert-dialog
items.title: MosaicAlertDialog
items.description: MosaicAlertDialog — confirm-before-irreversible-action dialog (compound API)

items.name: mosaic-animated-list
items.title: MosaicAnimatedList
items.description: Staggered reveal list. Children animate in on mount via CSS keyframe + inline animation-delay. Props: stagger?, children, as?. No motion dep. Respects prefers-reduced-motion.

items.name: mosaic-api-key-panel
items.title: MosaicApiKeyPanel
items.description: MosaicApiKeyPanel — presentational "bring your own key" (BYOK) panel.

items.name: mosaic-app-sidebar
items.title: MosaicAppSidebar
items.description: Collapsible sidebar (64px icon-only / 280px expanded) with nested nav, quick actions, recent items, and footer status slot. Full-width on mobile. Props: navItems[], quickActions[], recentItems[], logoSlot, footerStatus. No hardcoded routes or branding.

items.name: mosaic-approval-prompt
items.title: MosaicApprovalPrompt
items.description: MosaicApprovalPrompt — presentational "reprendre la main" tool-call approval

items.name: mosaic-clerk-org-switcher
items.title: MosaicClerkOrgSwitcher
items.description: Clerk-backed org switcher (live org data). Wraps <OrganizationSwitcher> with OKLCH appearance. DISTINCT from MosaicOrgSwitcher (presentational, orgs via props).

items.name: mosaic-org-profile-page
items.title: MosaicOrgProfilePage
items.description: Clerk <OrganizationProfile> for team management with OKLCH appearance. hash/path/virtual routing modes. Clerk injected as peer prop.

items.name: mosaic-sign-in-layout
items.title: MosaicSignInLayout
items.description: Sign-in page layout, themed, mobile-first. Wraps Clerk <SignIn> with OKLCH-token appearance. Clerk injected as peer prop.

items.name: mosaic-sign-up-layout
items.title: MosaicSignUpLayout
items.description: Sign-up page layout, themed, mobile-first. Wraps Clerk <SignUp> with OKLCH-token appearance. Clerk injected as peer prop.

items.name: mosaic-user-button
items.title: MosaicUserButton
items.description: Clerk <UserButton> with OKLCH-token appearance. Avatar + popover themed to mosaic tokens. Clerk injected as peer prop.

items.name: mosaic-avatar
items.title: MosaicAvatar
items.description: Avatar with image + fallback, built on @base-ui/react/avatar. Props: src, alt, fallback. data-slot="avatar".

items.name: mosaic-badge
items.title: MosaicBadge
items.description: Inline status badge. cva variants: default, secondary, destructive, outline. Style-only span, data-slot="badge".

items.name: mosaic-blurred-orb
items.title: MosaicBlurredOrb
items.description: Decorative blurred gradient orb background. Pure CSS (no extra dep). Props: colors?, size?, position?, blur?, opacity?. aria-hidden. No hardcoded branding.

items.name: mosaic-button
items.title: MosaicButton
items.description: Accessible button atom built on @base-ui/react. Variants: default, secondary, ghost, destructive, outline, link. Sizes: default, sm, lg, icon, icon-sm, icon-lg.

items.name: mosaic-card
items.title: MosaicCard
items.description: Composable card surface: Card + CardHeader + CardTitle + CardDescription + CardContent + CardFooter. Style-only, data-slot per part. OKLCH theme-reactive.

items.name: mosaic-chat-composer
items.title: MosaicChatComposer
items.description: MosaicChatComposer — presentational, controlled chat input + send/stop button

items.name: mosaic-chat-message
items.title: MosaicChatMessage
items.description: MosaicChatMessage — one chat message: role + ordered parts (text / reasoning / tool call).

items.name: mosaic-chat-sidebar
items.title: MosaicChatSidebar
items.description: MosaicChatSidebar — presentational, disposition-only column of conversation threads.

items.name: mosaic-chat-thread
items.title: MosaicChatThread
items.description: MosaicChatThread — presentational, auto-scrolling chat message stream

items.name: mosaic-checkbox
items.title: MosaicCheckbox
items.description: MosaicCheckbox — @base-ui/react Checkbox primitive

items.name: mosaic-collapsible
items.title: MosaicCollapsible
items.description: MosaicCollapsible — @base-ui/react Collapsible primitive

items.name: mosaic-combobox
items.title: MosaicCombobox
items.description: Filterable combobox built on @base-ui/react/combobox with useFilter. Props: items[], value, onValueChange, placeholder. data-slot="combobox".

items.name: mosaic-counter
items.title: MosaicCounter
items.description: Animated metric count-up. Counts from 0 to value on mount using requestAnimationFrame (no motion dep). Props: value, duration?, format?. Respects prefers-reduced-motion.

items.name: mosaic-dashboard-content
items.title: MosaicDashboardContent
items.description: Generic dashboard content area with view switcher. Tab-based view rendering. CSS fade-in transition.

items.name: mosaic-dashboard-header
items.title: MosaicDashboardHeader
items.description: Generic sticky dashboard header. Title/subtitle, search bar (desktop), notification bell, right-side actions slot.

items.name: mosaic-dashboard-layout
items.title: MosaicDashboardLayout
items.description: Full-height app shell: sticky header (title, subtitle, breadcrumbs, actions slot), persistent sidebar on desktop, hamburger + AdaptiveModal drawer on mobile. Props: title, subtitle, breadcrumbs[], actions, sidebarProps, renderLink. Zero hardcoded branding.

items.name: mosaic-data-table
items.title: MosaicDataTable
items.description: MosaicDataTable — generic sortable data table

items.name: mosaic-delete-confirmation-dialog
items.title: MosaicDeleteConfirmationDialog
items.description: Generic destructive-action confirm dialog. Built on @base-ui/react AlertDialog. Labels and item info are props.

items.name: mosaic-device-provider
items.title: MosaicDeviceProvider
items.description: Responsive device context provider. Exposes isMobile/isTablet/isDesktop, sm/md/lg/xl breakpoint flags, orientation, viewport size. Hooks: useDevice, useBreakpoint, useIsMobile, useIsTablet, useIsDesktop, useViewport, useOrientation. SSR-safe. Required by all adaptive components.

items.name: mosaic-document-upload
items.title: MosaicDocumentUpload
items.description: MosaicDocumentUpload — presentational document drop-zone + file status list

items.name: mosaic-drawer
items.title: MosaicDrawer
items.description: MosaicDrawer — agent detail viewed as a side panel (SW-xx)

items.name: mosaic-dropdown-menu
items.title: MosaicDropdownMenu
items.description: Dropdown menu built on @base-ui/react/menu: Trigger + items + separators. Keyboard nav, focus-visible. data-slot="dropdown-menu".

items.name: mosaic-edit-memory-dialog
items.title: MosaicEditMemoryDialog
items.description: MosaicEditMemoryDialog — dialog to correct a stale knowledge entry (a "memory"): edit its content, type and tags, then save or cancel.

items.name: mosaic-empty-state
items.title: MosaicEmptyState
items.description: MosaicEmptyState — centered vertical stack for empty/zero-data states

items.name: mosaic-falling-pattern
items.title: MosaicFallingPattern
items.description: Animated dot-grid background pattern (SVG + CSS falling dot animation). Props: density?, color?, animationDuration?. aria-hidden. No extra deps. Respects prefers-reduced-motion.

items.name: mosaic-feature-3col
items.title: MosaicFeature3Col
items.description: 3-column feature grid section. Props: heading?, subtext?, features[] {id, title, body, icon?}. Responsive: 1-col mobile, 3-col md+. Icon slot per cell. data-slot API. Distinct from MosaicFeatureCenteredMedia (single centered layout).

items.name: mosaic-feature-centered-media
items.title: MosaicFeatureCenteredMedia
items.description: Centered feature section: heading + body + optional feature grid + centered media slot. Props: title, body, features[], media.

items.name: mosaic-field
items.title: MosaicField
items.description: Accessible form field built on @base-ui/react/field: Field + Label + Control + Description + Error with wired a11y associations. data-slot="field".

items.name: mosaic-filter-bar
items.title: MosaicFilterBar
items.description: MosaicFilterBar — responsive horizontal control bar for filter rows

items.name: mosaic-filter-sidebar
items.title: MosaicFilterSidebar
items.description: Generic collapsible filter sidebar. Filter tabs + category list with counts. Reusable across agents/marketplace/templates.

items.name: mosaic-footer-simple
items.title: MosaicFooterSimple
items.description: Simple multi-column footer. Props: columns[] {id, heading, links[]}, legal, logo?, social[] {label, href, iconSrc?}.

items.name: mosaic-hero-split
items.title: MosaicHeroSplit
items.description: Two-column split hero: copy left, media right. Props: eyebrow, title, subtitle, cta, ctaSecondary, media. Falls back to centered single-column when no media.

items.name: mosaic-input
items.title: MosaicInput
items.description: Text input built on @base-ui/react/input. Forwards ref to native input. data-slot="input".

items.name: mosaic-input-group
items.title: MosaicInputGroup
items.description: Composition wrapper laying out prefix/suffix addons around an input. data-slot="input-group".

items.name: mosaic-integrations-badge
items.title: MosaicIntegrationsBadge
items.description: Integration badge/pill with logo slot + label. Renders as <a> when href provided. Props: label, logo?, href?, target?. OKLCH theme-reactive. No hardcoded branding.

items.name: mosaic-kanban-board
items.title: MosaicKanbanBoard
items.description: MosaicKanbanBoard — horizontal scrollable kanban board container.

items.name: mosaic-logos-grid
items.title: MosaicLogosGrid
items.description: Logo cloud / partner logos grid. Props: logos[] {name, src, width, height}, heading. Grayscale hover effect. Optional stagger-motion variant: pass stagger=true or stagger=80 for CSS keyframe staggered reveal; respects prefers-reduced-motion.

items.name: mosaic-main-nav
items.title: MosaicMainNav
items.description: Generic responsive top-nav. Desktop: inline link strip. Mobile: hamburger + drawer. Items are props.

items.name: mosaic-markdown
items.title: MosaicMarkdown
items.description: MosaicMarkdown — presentational, dependency-free markdown renderer

items.name: mosaic-marketplace-card
items.title: MosaicMarketplaceCard
items.description: MosaicMarketplaceCard — standalone agent-type gallery tile (M1)

items.name: mosaic-marketplace-list
items.title: MosaicMarketplaceList
items.description: Responsive marketplace grid/list (responsive-pair). Install/uninstall actions, rating, downloads, price.

items.name: mosaic-memory-card
items.title: MosaicMemoryCard
items.description: MosaicMemoryCard — memory item card (detailed / compact variants)

items.name: mosaic-memory-dashboard
items.title: MosaicMemoryDashboard
items.description: MosaicMemoryDashboard — landing surface of a knowledge base: a header with a title and a primary "add" action, a row of host-supplied summary statistics, an optional slot for a search bar, a host-controlled view-mode toggle (tiles / rows), and a slot for results.

items.name: mosaic-memory-grid
items.title: MosaicMemoryGrid
items.description: MosaicMemoryGrid — presentational, tile-disposition-only grid of host items

items.name: mosaic-memory-list
items.title: MosaicMemoryList
items.description: MosaicMemoryList — presentational, row-disposition-only list of host items

items.name: mosaic-memory-search
items.title: MosaicMemorySearch
items.description: MosaicMemorySearch — search bar over a host-supplied knowledge base: a query input, optional filter chips (by type/tag), a clear action, and a result-count indication.

items.name: mosaic-message-card
items.title: MosaicMessageCard
items.description: Generic message/chat card. Sender avatar, like/dislike, bookmark, copy, reply. Compact mode.

items.name: mosaic-message-list
items.title: MosaicMessageList
items.description: Responsive message list (responsive-pair). Desktop: sticky header + search. Mobile: compact list.

items.name: mosaic-model-selector
items.title: MosaicModelSelector
items.description: MosaicModelSelector — @base-ui/react Combobox primitive

items.name: mosaic-module-card
items.title: MosaicModuleCard
items.description: Selected-module display card for composer slot. Shows name, description, optional details, emoji icon, tags, edit/remove actions. Props: type, module {name, description, details?, icon?, tags?}, onEdit, onRemove, isSelected, isCustom. Generic — no debate domain types.

items.name: mosaic-module-library
items.title: MosaicModuleLibrary
items.description: Generic module/library manager (responsive-pair). Includes MosaicModuleForm. Tabs, search, CRUD callbacks.

items.name: mosaic-multi-tenant-provider
items.title: MosaicMultiTenantProvider
items.description: Wraps <ClerkProvider> + cloud-identity workspace-scope context. resolveWorkspaceId prop integrates @vantageos/cloud-identity. Exposes useMosaicWorkspace hook.

items.name: use-effective-workspace-id
items.title: useEffectiveWorkspaceId
items.description: Re-exposes cloud-identity workspace resolver as a typed React hook. Reads from MosaicMultiTenantProvider context.

items.name: mosaic-clerk-webhook-handler
items.title: MosaicClerkWebhookHandler
items.description: Template handler: Clerk -> Convex sync for organization.created + organizationMembership.created/deleted. svix signature verification. Returns Next.js App Router compatible Response.

items.name: mosaic-navbar
items.title: MosaicNavbar
items.description: Scroll-aware fixed navbar: hide-on-scroll-down, blur backdrop, mobile hamburger menu. Props: logo, links[], cta. No hardcoded branding.

items.name: mosaic-org-panel
items.title: MosaicOrgPanel
items.description: Generic org management shell. Includes MosaicOrgRoleBadge, MosaicMultiOrgIndicator, MosaicCreateOrgDialog, MosaicInviteMemberDialog, MosaicMemberList. Pure presentational — no Clerk/Convex.

items.name: mosaic-org-switcher
items.title: MosaicOrgSwitcher
items.description: Presentational org picker dropdown. Current org + avatar in trigger. Pure props — no Clerk. Auth wiring is T1.5.

items.name: mosaic-pdf-viewer
items.title: MosaicPdfViewer
items.description: Presentational inline PDF preview via the browser's native PDF renderer (iframe). Host-controlled page navigation and zoom, local loading/error status (no PDF library, no network call by the component itself).

items.name: mosaic-popover
items.title: MosaicPopover
items.description: MosaicPopover — @base-ui/react Popover primitive, anchored to any host element

items.name: mosaic-preferences-panel
items.title: MosaicPreferencesPanel
items.description: Generic user preferences form. Grouped sections with select and toggle fields. Fully controlled via props.

items.name: mosaic-pricing-card
items.title: MosaicPricingCard
items.description: Single pricing tier card. Props: tier, price, features[], cta, highlighted. Compose multiple in a grid for a full pricing section.

items.name: mosaic-profile-panel
items.title: MosaicProfilePanel
items.description: Generic user profile form. Avatar upload slot, field list, security section. Fully controlled via props.

items.name: mosaic-progress
items.title: MosaicProgress
items.description: MosaicProgress — @base-ui/react Progress primitive

items.name: mosaic-quick-action-card
items.title: MosaicQuickActionCard
items.description: Grid of action cards with 6 accent color presets (yellow, blue, green, purple, orange, cyan). CSS stagger reveal on mount. Props: actions[] {id, title, description, icon, href, accent?}, heading, columns, renderLink. No hardcoded routes.

items.name: mosaic-quick-actions-menu
items.title: MosaicQuickActionsMenu
items.description: Generic + button dropdown for quick actions. Items with icon + label + separator. Custom link renderer prop.

items.name: mosaic-quick-agent-selector
items.title: MosaicQuickAgentSelector
items.description: Compact agent pill picker with desktop dropdown / mobile drawer. Selected agents shown as removable pills.

items.name: mosaic-radio-group
items.title: MosaicRadioGroup
items.description: MosaicRadioGroup — @base-ui/react RadioGroup + Radio primitives

items.name: mosaic-resizable-split-pane
items.title: MosaicResizableSplitPane
items.description: Presentational resizable two-pane content layout (drag or arrow-key resize, host-controlled width and collapsed state). Forms a pair with MosaicPdfViewer for side-by-side document preview + edit panel.

items.name: mosaic-save-template-modal
items.title: MosaicSaveTemplateModal
items.description: MosaicSaveTemplateModal — presentational "save as template" form modal

items.name: mosaic-scroll-area
items.title: MosaicScrollArea
items.description: MosaicScrollArea — @base-ui/react ScrollArea primitive

items.name: mosaic-select
items.title: MosaicSelect
items.description: Listbox select built on @base-ui/react/select. Props: items[], value, onValueChange, placeholder. Keyboard + focus management. data-slot="select".

items.name: mosaic-selector-modal
items.title: MosaicSelectorModal
items.description: Generic searchable item picker modal. Search bar + category tabs + card grid. Confirm/cancel actions.

items.name: mosaic-separator
items.title: MosaicSeparator
items.description: MosaicSeparator — @base-ui/react Separator primitive

items.name: mosaic-skeleton
items.title: MosaicSkeleton
items.description: MosaicSkeleton — loading skeleton primitive for @vantageos/mosaic-blocks.

items.name: mosaic-slider
items.title: MosaicSlider
items.description: MosaicSlider — @base-ui/react Slider primitive

items.name: mosaic-stats-grid
items.title: MosaicStatsGrid
items.description: Border-grid statistics section. Props: stats[] {label, value}, heading, subtext. Values are plain strings; animate at consumer level.

items.name: mosaic-step-pipeline
items.title: MosaicStepPipeline
items.description: MosaicStepPipeline — ordered stage progress pipeline

items.name: mosaic-switch
items.title: MosaicSwitch
items.description: Toggle switch built on @base-ui/react/switch. Controlled + uncontrolled, role=switch, keyboard accessible. data-slot="switch".

items.name: mosaic-tabs
items.title: MosaicTabs
items.description: MosaicTabs — @base-ui/react Tabs primitive

items.name: mosaic-tag-input
items.title: MosaicTagInput
items.description: MosaicTagInput — presentational tag/chip input with optional autocomplete.

items.name: mosaic-template-agent-card
items.title: MosaicTemplateAgentCard
items.description: MosaicTemplateAgentCard — agent-type template preview card

items.name: mosaic-template-category-chips
items.title: MosaicTemplateCategoryChips
items.description: MosaicTemplateCategoryChips — presentational horizontal chip row filtering agent-templates by category.

items.name: mosaic-template-gallery
items.title: MosaicTemplateGallery
items.description: Responsive template browser (responsive-pair). Includes MosaicTemplateCard, MosaicTemplatePreview, MosaicQuickStartPanel, MosaicAgentTeamPreview.

items.name: mosaic-template-list
items.title: MosaicTemplateList
items.description: MosaicTemplateList — presentational, disposition-only list of host items

items.name: mosaic-template-management-panel
items.title: MosaicTemplateManagementPanel
items.description: MosaicTemplateManagementPanel — manage a host-supplied list of saved agent templates: rename, duplicate, delete.

items.name: mosaic-testimonials-grid
items.title: MosaicTestimonialsGrid
items.description: Masonry-style testimonials grid: featured item spans half width, rest stack. Props: testimonials[] {id, quote, author, role, avatar?, logo?}, heading.

items.name: mosaic-textarea
items.title: MosaicTextarea
items.description: MosaicTextarea — native <textarea> styled atom

items.name: mosaic-theme-provider
items.title: MosaicThemeProvider
items.description: Thin next-themes ThemeProvider wrapper. Generic, zero branding. All ThemeProviderProps forwarded.

items.name: mosaic-theme-toggle
items.title: MosaicThemeToggle
items.description: Light/dark/system theme toggle. Flips data-theme on document.documentElement. Props: themes?, onChange?, label?. Theme-reactive via OKLCH CSS vars.

items.name: mosaic-toast
items.title: MosaicToast
items.description: Presentational ephemeral notification (success/error/info/warning), optional auto-dismiss via durationMs, host-controlled action node. Paired with MosaicToastProvider for stack positioning (top-right/top-center/bottom-right/bottom-center). No toast queue/runtime — the host owns the visible stack.

items.name: mosaic-tool-toggle-list
items.title: MosaicToolToggleList
items.description: MosaicToolToggleList — presentational per-tool enable switch + approval level selector, grouped into host-supplied sections.

items.name: mosaic-tooltip
items.title: MosaicTooltip
items.description: MosaicTooltip — @base-ui/react Tooltip primitive

items.name: mosaic-url-scraper
items.title: MosaicUrlScraper
items.description: MosaicUrlScraper — presentational URL-input + scraped-content preview
